nodes.title: Buckets issues

content.content:
# Buckets issues

This section groups related buckets issues documents.

nodes.title: Bucket name conflict symptom (Buckets)
nodes.summary: Resolve "bucket name conflict" — symptom for the Buckets surface.

content.text: Symptom
An operation against the Buckets surface fails with an error matching "bucket name conflict (symptom)".
Resolution
Inspect the error envelope.Re-issue with corrected parameters.Confirm via the audit log.
See the Buckets API reference for the exact field set.
